title: ornithogalum leucanthum
intro: Ornithogalum leucanthum, also known as the White Star of Bethlehem, is a flowering plant species in the lily family Asparagaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ornithogalum leucanthum include relieving coughs, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, and can also be found in capsule or tincture form.
